assignments.twist: dry (Coulomb) friction adds a sign(velocity) drift, giving a piecewise-linear drift and non-smooth potential
Langevin equation with both viscous and solid-solid dry-friction forces on a Brownian particle

core_model_summary: An overdamped Brownian particle subject to both viscous and dry (Coulomb) friction, solved via its Langevin equation and the associated time-dependent Fokker-Planck equation for the velocity propagator.
